mapper.sql: id, factor_name, energy_type, factor_value, measurement_unit, source, effective_year, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM cm_emission_factor WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cm_emission_factor ( factor_name, energy_type, factor_value, measurement_unit, source, effective_year, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{factorName}, #{energyType}, #{factorValue}, #{measurementUnit}, #{source}, #{effectiveYear}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE cm_emission_factor
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, factor_name = #{factorName}, energy_type = #{energyType}, factor_value = #{factorValue}, measurement_unit = #{measurementUnit}, source = #{source}, effective_year = #{effectiveYear}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
